articles.title: Katseye on Carrying Representation to Coachella and the Pressures of Rapid Fame
articles.summary: “I never had an Indian pop star that I could look up to in Western music. I always knew that if I wanted that, I have to be that for the little girl inside of me,” member Lara Raj said in a new YouTube documentary. The post Katseye on Carrying Representation to Coachella and the Pressures of Rapid Fame appeared first on Rolling Stone India .
